description: Configuration for connecting AIKokoron frontend to Koclaw Gateway

notes.websocket_url: WebSocket channel on the Koclaw Gateway (matches config.toml [channels.websocket])
notes.static_assets_url: HTTP server for Live2D models and voice assets (matches config.toml [gateway.static_files])
notes.remote_access: For remote servers, use SSH tunneling: ssh -L 18791:127.0.0.1:18791 -L 18792:127.0.0.1:18792 user@server
